title: Middle Eastern Shakshuka
description: A flavorful North African dish from the Middle East, shakshuka is a simple yet delicious meal made with eggs poached in a rich tomato sauce.

ingredients.name: Middle Eastern spices
ingredients.notes: a mix of cumin, paprika, and coriander

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large cast-iron skillet over medium heat.
Add the onions and bell pepper, and cook until they start to soften.
Add the garlic and cook for another minute.
Add the tomatoes and cook for 10-15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add the Middle Eastern spices and stir to combine.
Make four wells in the tomato sauce, and crack an egg into each well.
Transfer the skillet to the oven, and bake at 400°F (200°C) for 15-20 minutes, or until the eggs are cooked to your liking.
Serve the shakshuka hot, garnished with fresh parsley or cilantro.
